title: Andy Grove
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2022 01 08 intels andrew grove.

Andy Grove — Hungarian-born CEO of Intel (1987–1998), author of Only the Paranoid Survive and High Output Management. Canonical mentor-from-afar for operator-curious founders. Coined strategic inflection point.

Yahir flagged the name in a Jan 8 2022 empty-body Apple Note as a reading-list bookmark; whether he's actually read Grove since is open.

Wikilinks
